'''Pakkerd Light Transport''' was a company that produced a variety of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles for use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. The company was a division of [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], but the company was sold when the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] was killed over [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. When [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] reached the height of his power, he took over the company under the alias of [[Zsinj|Oan Pakkerd]]. Zsinj used the business as a way to hide his intentions of producing a new squad of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and assigning them to the [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] before the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] could shut down the business. With the aid of the captured [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']], [[Wraith Squadron]] was able to destroy the Pakkerd plant and Zsinj's reinforcements.
